hero.label: Casablanca, Morocco — MENA Chemical Trade
hero.desc: FDL Chemicals is a premier Casablanca-based import, export, and distribution company serving industrial, agricultural, and specialty chemical markets across Morocco and the MENA region.

about.label: About FDL Chemicals
about.p1: Founded in Casablanca's industrial heart, FDL Chemicals has spent over 15 years forging direct relationships with chemical manufacturers across Europe, Asia, and the Americas — delivering certified, compliant materials to manufacturers and processors throughout Morocco and the broader MENA region.
about.p2: Our technical team bridges the gap between global supply networks and local industrial demand, handling customs, logistics, regulatory documentation, and last-mile delivery with operational precision.
about.cardDesc: From origin sourcing and regulatory compliance to bonded warehousing and ADR-certified transport — FDL manages the full chemical supply chain with documented quality at every step.

items.name: Industrial Acids
items.desc: High-purity mineral and organic acids for manufacturing processes.

items.name: Agricultural Chemicals
items.desc: Fertilizers, pesticides, and crop nutrition inputs for Moroccan agri-industry.

items.name: Specialty Solvents
items.desc: Industrial and laboratory-grade solvents for precision applications.

items.name: Caustic & Bases
items.desc: Alkali solutions for chemical synthesis, paper, and textile industries.

items.name: Water Treatment
items.desc: Coagulants, flocculants, and biocides for municipal and industrial water systems.

items.name: Polymer Additives
items.desc: Stabilizers, plasticizers, and flame retardants for plastics manufacturing.

items.name: Surface Treatment
items.desc: Pickling agents, passivators, and metal surface prep chemicals.

items.name: Food-Grade Chemicals
items.desc: Food-safe additives, preservatives, and processing aids — Halal and GMP certified.

features.title: Technical Expertise
features.body: Our team of chemical engineers and industry specialists provide product selection guidance, SDS documentation, and formulation support tailored to your process requirements.

features.title: Regulatory Compliance
features.body: Full REACH registration, MSDS management, ADR transport compliance, and Moroccan customs clearance handled in-house — ensuring zero regulatory delays on every shipment.

features.title: End-to-End Logistics
features.body: From bonded warehouse in Casablanca Port to factory-gate delivery — we manage multimodal freight, hazmat certifications, temperature-controlled storage, and last-mile distribution.

map.label: Global Network
map.body: FDL Chemicals sources directly from licensed manufacturers in Germany, Belgium, Spain, China, India, and the United States — and distributes across Morocco, West Africa, and the wider MENA region through certified logistics partners.

items.name: REACH
items.desc: EU chemical registration, evaluation and authorization compliance

items.name: ISO 9001
items.desc: Quality management systems — international standard certification

items.name: ADR
items.desc: Dangerous goods road transport compliance across EU and MENA

items.name: Halal
items.desc: Halal-certified food-grade and processing chemical products

items.name: MSDS
items.desc: Full material safety data sheets for all products in portfolio

items.name: COA
items.desc: Certificates of analysis issued for every batch and delivery

items.name: GMP
items.desc: Good manufacturing practice standards for food and pharma grade

items.name: Customs
items.desc: Licensed customs broker — Morocco and international clearance
